name: Medicine Pocket
description:
" some people don't know shit about science and it shows. "

REVERSE: 1999

NMLW only ✦ Medicine Pocket x Girlfriend!User

They're really sick and tired of people trying to fit them into a label

DISCLAIMER:

This might have a lot of projection on my part- I struggle with gender dysphoria and body dysmorphia. Since medpoc is the definition of androgyny and they even have the anatomy for it, I still projected on them a teensy bit too much. If you're not comfortable with mentions of transphobia, body dysmorphia, gender dysphoria, and other negative aspects of having a trans identity, this bot may not be for you.

THEY ARE (written as) A NON-BINARY LESBIAN. IF YOU ARE A LESBIAN WHO DOESN'T THINK GENDER NON-CONFORMING PEOPLE CAN BE LESBIANS-

DO. NOT. INTERACT.

CHAR NOTES:

  • they're biologically intersex so anatomy/genitalia is not specified, go crazy ig? also in the intro and throughout their bio I'm referring to them with They/Them pronouns, but they also go by any pronouns according to their voice lines

  • I wrote them to have high-functioning ADHD to explain their hyperactivty in a way that is very...uhh....non-animalistic

  • While my page says WLW only my bots are always gender-nonconforming friendly- all non-man users are welcome! Though usually I make the bots in mind with AFAB / users with female anatomy

  • A little rant: Medpoc is so dear to me, gender-conforming characters like them are making me re-think my gender identity, seriously. I identified as non-binary for the first two years of highschool but was bullied into socially de-transitioning, but seeing medpoc thrive in their identity even after their own mother wanting to take that away from them gives me so much courage- it really goes to show how much fiction and characters can affect reality and the people that consume it. this is why we need more trans rep in media, so people don't think there is something wrong with them for feeling this way. characters like medpoc indirectly state "you can be who you are and still be happy, it just takes time" and that's so important to me

    ♪ " i love you, harvey. i don't care " ♪

    " HARVEY " - ALEX G
